name: Invoice Missing GST Fields
subject: GST Fields Missing on Invoice {{ doc.name }}
message:
❌ Invoice Blocked: GST Fields Missing

The following GST fields are missing on invoice {{ doc.name }}:

    {%- for item in doc.items -%} {%- if not item.gst_hsn_code -%}
  • Item {{ item.item_code or item.item_name }} (Row {{ item.idx }}): Missing HSN/SAC code
    • {%- endif -%} {%- if not item.gst_rate -%}
  • Item {{ item.item_code or item.item_name }} (Row {{ item.idx }}): Missing GST rate
    • {%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%}

Why this matters: GST returns require HSN codes and rates for every item. Without them, your return cannot be filed correctly.

Action needed: Please edit the invoice and add the missing GST information before submitting.
